title: pilosella fastigiatiformis
intro: Pilosella fastigiatiformis, also known as a species of the Sutherlandia genus, is a type of plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pilosella fastigiatiformis are thought to be attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Pilosella fastigiatiformis are typically made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
